info.title: spiderly
info.description: By using the Spiderly CLI, you properly initialize the app, allowing all other Spiderly libraries to function.

options.name: --name
options.description: App name without spaces (you can change it later).

options.name: --db
options.description: Database provider: sqlserver or postgresql (you can change it later).

options.name: --db-connection-string
options.description: Full EF Core connection string. Bypasses

options.name: --pm
options.description: Package manager: npm (default), pnpm, yarn, or bun.
